title: tragacantha stocksii
intro: Tragacantha stocksii, also known as Astragalus stocksii, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China, used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help boost the immune system and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha stocksii include teas, capsules, and infusions, often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
